lines.english: Where was the station's Commanding Officer?
lines.raw: Where was the station's Commanding Officer? | 车站的指挥官在哪里？

lines.english: A pilot noticed a balloon which seemed to be making for a Royal Air Force station nearby.
lines.chinese: 一名飞行员注意到一个气球，它似乎正朝着附近的一个皇家空军基地飞去。
lines.raw: A pilot noticed a balloon which seemed to be making for a Royal Air Force station nearby. | 一名飞行员注意到一个气球，它似乎正朝着附近的一个皇家空军基地飞去。

lines.english: He informed the station at once, but no one there was able to explain the mystery.
lines.chinese: 他立即通知了基地，但那里没有人能解释这个谜团。
lines.raw: He informed the station at once, but no one there was able to explain the mystery. | 他立即通知了基地，但那里没有人能解释这个谜团。

lines.english: The officer in the control tower was very angry when he heard the news,
lines.chinese: 控制塔里的军官听到这个消息后非常生气，
lines.raw: The officer in the control tower was very angry when he heard the news, | 控制塔里的军官听到这个消息后非常生气，

lines.english: because balloons can be a great danger to aircraft.
lines.chinese: 因为气球对飞机来说可能是一个巨大的危险。
lines.raw: because balloons can be a great danger to aircraft. | 因为气球对飞机来说可能是一个巨大的危险。

lines.english: He said that someone might be spying on the station and the pilot was ordered to keep track of the strange object.
lines.chinese: 他说可能有人在监视基地，飞行员被命令跟踪这个奇怪的物体。
lines.raw: He said that someone might be spying on the station and the pilot was ordered to keep track of the strange object. | 他说可能有人在监视基地，飞行员被命令跟踪这个奇怪的物体。

lines.english: The pilot managed to circle the balloon for some time.
lines.chinese: 飞行员设法绕着气球盘旋了一段时间。
lines.raw: The pilot managed to circle the balloon for some time. | 飞行员设法绕着气球盘旋了一段时间。

lines.english: He could make out three men in a basket under it and one of them was holding a pair of binoculars.
lines.chinese: 他能辨认出气球下面的篮子里有三个人，其中一人拿着一副双筒望远镜。
lines.raw: He could make out three men in a basket under it and one of them was holding a pair of binoculars. | 他能辨认出气球下面的篮子里有三个人，其中一人拿着一副双筒望远镜。

lines.english: When the balloon was over the station, the pilot saw one of the men taking photographs.
lines.chinese: 当气球飞到基地上空时，飞行员看到其中一个人在拍照。
lines.raw: When the balloon was over the station, the pilot saw one of the men taking photographs. | 当气球飞到基地上空时，飞行员看到其中一个人在拍照。

lines.english: Soon afterwards, the balloon began to descend and it landed near an airfield.
lines.chinese: 不久之后，气球开始下降，并降落在一个机场附近。
lines.raw: Soon afterwards, the balloon began to descend and it landed near an airfield. | 不久之后，气球开始下降，并降落在一个机场附近。

lines.english: The police were called in, but they could not arrest anyone,
lines.chinese: 警方被召来，但他们无法逮捕任何人，
lines.raw: The police were called in, but they could not arrest anyone, | 警方被召来，但他们无法逮捕任何人，

lines.english: for the basket contained two Members of Parliament and the Commanding Officer of the station!
lines.chinese: 因为篮子里坐着两名议会成员和基地的指挥官！
lines.raw: for the basket contained two Members of Parliament and the Commanding Officer of the station! | 因为篮子里坐着两名议会成员和基地的指挥官！

lines.english: As the Commanding Officer explained later, one half of the station did not know what the other half was doing!
lines.chinese: 正如指挥官后来解释的那样，基地的一半人不知道另一半人在做什么！
lines.raw: As the Commanding Officer explained later, one half of the station did not know what the other half was doing! | 正如指挥官后来解释的那样，基地的一半人不知道另一半人在做什么！
